block_00: ​​Have a Blast with us this Diwali by joining this exclusive Tournament.
block_02: Umeed hai iss saal Diwali dher saari khushiyan lekar aaye jo aapke aur aapke parivar ke liye ek shubh bhare naye saal ki shuruwat kare. Shubh Deepavali!
block_03: Waqt aa gaya hai jab aap saare traders aapne parivaar ke saath hamare iss naye tournament ka aanand uthaaye — Diwali Blast Tournament 2022, jo on 23 Oct – 04 Nov 2022 ko aarambh hoyega, jisme Top-15 Indian trader $1,500 ka guaranteed prize money share karenge
block_09: 23 October 2022 ko shamil hu kay moqabala karien!
block_10: Spread some cheer with us this Diwali by joining this exclusive Tournament
